## Article

**Source**: Yahoo News - World (via AFP)
**Published**: 2026-04-30T20:44:30.000Z
**URL**: https://www.yahoo.com/news/articles/us-venezuela-flights-resume-sign-014449711.html

### Headline

First direct US-Venezuela flight in years arrives in Caracas

### Reported Details

The first direct flight between the United States and Venezuela in seven years landed Thursday in Caracas, a new sign of thawing relations after Washington deposed leftist leader Nicolas Maduro."Today...

## Reporting Context
